title: Smoky Crispy Italian Pasta Salad
description: A smoky, crispy crowd‑pleaser that combines poached pasta, a zesty vinaigrette, and crunchy roasted fennel for a fresh Italian twist.
instructions: Bring a large pot of soda water to a boil, add sea salt, and cook the pasta al dente according to package instructions, about 8 minutes.
Drain the pasta and rinse under cold running water until it stops steaming, then transfer to a large bowl and let cool completely.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, liquid smoke, lemon juice, and red wine vinegar to make the dressing.
Toss the cooled pasta with the dressing until evenly coated.
Spread the pasta in a single layer on a parchment-lined baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes, stirring halfway, until the edges are crisp.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly, then fold in diced roasted fennel, black olives, and marinated artichoke hearts.
Sprinkle chopped basil over the salad and gently mix.
Serve immediately or chill in the refrigerator for 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
